commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Burden. Such prophecies more especially are called burdens, as threaten grievous evils and punishments. (Challoner)
He says not against whom, because the menace is directed to persecutors in general. (Worthington)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Burden: Such prophecies more especially are called burdens, as threaten grievous evils and punishments.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: HABACUC was a native of Bezocher, and prophesied in JUDA, some time before the invasion of the CHALDEANS, which he foretold. He lived to see this prophecy fulfilled, and for many years after, according to the general opinion, which supposes him to be the same that was brought by the ANGEL to DANIEL in BABYLON, Dan. 14.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
